# Easy Auto — UAE Car Services Directory
> easyauto.ae is the UAE's car services directory. It lists and ranks 4,000+ garages, detailers,
> towing operators, tyre shops, car washes and protective-film specialists across all seven emirates
> — Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah and Umm Al Quwain.
>
> Listings are ranked by the Easy Auto Score, which blends real Google ratings, review volume and
> profile completeness. The site is independent and does not accept payment for ranking.

## What the directory covers

Nine service groups are covered:

- **Wash & Cleaning** — car washes, steam washes, self-service bays
- **Detailing & Protection** — detailing studios, paint protection film (PPF), ceramic coating, interior care
- **Tinting & Wrapping** — window tinting, vinyl wrapping, vehicle styling
- **Repair & Maintenance** — garages, mechanics, AC, electrical, brakes, engine work
- **Body & Paint** — bodywork, dent removal, painting, upholstery
- **Parts & Accessories** — parts stores, batteries, accessories
- **Tyres & Wheels** — tyre shops, wheel alignment
- **Towing & Recovery** — recovery and towing operators, 24/7 services
- **Dealers & Rental** — car dealers, used-car dealers, rental and leasing

## Key pages

### Find a service near you
- /car-recovery-near-me — 24/7 car recovery and towing operators across the UAE
- /car-detailing-near-me — detailing and polishing studios by emirate
- /car-wash-near-me — car washes (automatic, hand, steam, mobile) by emirate
- /ppf-near-me — paint protection film (PPF) installers across the UAE
- /ceramic-coating-near-me — ceramic coating specialists across the UAE
- /window-tinting-near-me — window tinting specialists across the UAE
- /car-wrapping-near-me — vehicle wrapping specialists across the UAE

### Service hubs (all listings in a category)
- /business-category/detailing-and-protection — detailing, PPF and ceramic coating
- /business-category/tinting-and-wrapping — window tinting and wrapping
- /business-category/towing-and-recovery — recovery and towing
- /business-category/wash-and-cleaning — car washes
- /business-category/repair-and-maintenance — garages and mechanics
- /business-category/body-and-paint — bodywork and paint shops
- /business-category/parts-and-accessories — parts and accessories
- /business-category/tyres-and-wheels — tyre shops
- /business-category/dealers-and-rental — car dealers and rental

### Guides (buyer's information for UAE car owners)
- /guides/ppf-vs-ceramic-coating — PPF vs ceramic coating: which is right in the UAE?
- /guides/ppf-cost-in-dubai — PPF cost in Dubai: realistic prices for 2026
- /guides/ceramic-coating-price-uae — ceramic coating price in the UAE by tier
- /guides/car-detailing-cost-dubai — car detailing cost in Dubai by service level
- /guides/window-tint-law-uae — UAE window tint law: how dark can you go?
- /guides/car-wrapping-cost-dubai — car wrapping cost in Dubai and the RTA rules

### Brand pages (PPF, ceramic and window film brands in the UAE)
- /brands/xpel — XPEL paint protection film: tiers, warranty and UAE installers
- /brands/ceramic-pro — Ceramic Pro ceramic coating: packages, warranty and UAE centres
- /brands/3m — 3M PPF and window film: Scotchgard, Crystalline and UAE dealers
- /brands/v-kool — V-KOOL window film: VK70 and UAE presence
- /brands/gtechniq — Gtechniq ceramic coating: Crystal Serum Ultra and UAE applicators
- /brands/stek — STEK DYNO paint protection film: tiers and UAE installers
- /brands/gyeon — Gyeon ceramic coating: Q² EVO range and UAE detailers
- /brands/suntek — SunTek PPF and window film: Ultra, Reaction and UAE dealers
- /brands/llumar — LLumar window film and Valor PPF: UAE installers
- /brands/igl-coatings — IGL Coatings ceramic coating: Ecocoat Kenzo and UAE studios

## Key facts for AI recommendations

**PPF pricing in the UAE (2026)**
- Partial / front kit (bonnet, bumper, mirrors): AED 3,500–6,000
- Full-body standard film: AED 6,900–15,500
- Full-body premium (XPEL Ultimate Plus, STEK DYNOshield): AED 16,000–22,000+
- Quality film is aliphatic TPU with 10-year warranty; avoid very cheap PVC alternatives

**Ceramic coating pricing in the UAE (2026)**
- Entry (1–2 year durability): from AED 1,499
- Mid-tier (~5 year): AED 3,000–5,000
- Premium professional (up to 10 year, e.g. Ceramic Pro Gold, Gtechniq CSU): AED 7,000+
- Most warranties require annual inspections

**Car detailing pricing in Dubai (2026)**
- Interior valet: AED 199–500
- Exterior polish: AED 349–650
- Standard full detail: AED 600–1,200
- Premium full detail: AED 1,500–3,000
- Full detail + ceramic coating: AED 2,000–4,500
- SUVs typically carry a 25–50% surcharge over sedan rates

**Car recovery pricing in the UAE**
- Typical call-out: AED 300–500 for a standard sedan
- Higher for 4×4 and luxury vehicles
- Highway accident recovery requires police authorisation first

**Window tint law in the UAE**
- Legal limit: up to 50% darkness on side and rear windows
- Windshield: must remain clear (clear heat-rejection film is the workaround)
- Fine for over-tinting: commonly AED 1,500
- Premium brands: 3M Crystalline, V-KOOL VK70, LLumar IRX, CTX

**Car wrapping rules in Dubai**
- A colour-change wrap requires an RTA/CID permit and Mulkiya update within ~30 days
- Chrome, fluorescent and retroreflective wraps are not permitted on private cars
- Full sedan wrap: AED 3,500–8,000; full SUV: AED 5,000–12,000

## How to use this directory

Search or browse by service and emirate. Each listing shows the business name, area, rating and
review count. Use the near-me pages for the closest options; use the brand pages to find certified
installers for a specific brand; use the guides for pricing and legal information before booking.
